name: claude_skills_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the claude_skills capability.

prompts.name: code_assist_prompt
prompts.use_case: Enhancing coding workflows with advanced AI skills across multiple programming agents

prompts.name: agent_command_prompt
prompts.template:
Execute this command using the {agent_name} coding agent:

{agent_command}
prompts.use_case: Automating compliance checks and product advisory through AI plugins

prompts.name: domain_advisory_prompt
prompts.template:
As a {domain_expert}, provide recommendations based on the input:

{input_data}
prompts.use_case: Providing marketing and C-level strategic insights via AI-driven agent interactions
